suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The os-worker skill's visual verification step could note that pure refactors (comment updates, docstring fixes, code extraction without behavior changes) don't require QEMU screenshot verification, even when they touch display pipeline files. This would save worker time on cleanup features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature visual-overhaul-cleanup was a pure refactor (7 code quality items: docstring updates, stale comment removal, code extraction, doc correction) with no behavior change. Worker correctly skipped visual verification but the skill's 'MANDATORY for display pipeline changes' wording is ambiguous about whether structural-only changes count.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md test baseline (921 tests) may need updating if test counts changed across missions.
rejectedObservations.reason: Verified: 900 system + 21 prototype = 921 total. The baseline is accurate. No update needed.
